stemHtml: Consider PBN operations, what is one advantage of navigating using computed data, compared to raw data? The area navigation system will:

options.a: Provide 3D navigation for the whole route.
options.b: Check the validity and in some cases consistency of sensor data before use.
options.c: Give a more accurate position, regardless of the sensor data that is being used.
options.d: Only use data from one sensor for navigation.
